visual_description: A man with long dark hair, wearing a dark red jacket and jeans, stands in a dimly lit room, holding a large wooden stick or bat. He is seen from behind, looking into an adjacent bedroom through an arched doorway. The room has a vintage aesthetic with a white refrigerator on the left and a radiator on the right.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a low, calm tone, saying, 'Come out, wherever you are.' The audio is clear and the voice sounds close to the microphone.
